description: An assessment or findings document that presents analysis results, observations, recommendations, and supporting evidence from an investigation, audit, or review.
distinguishing_characteristics: Each finding has supporting evidence or observations
Often includes severity or priority ratings
May reference standards, frameworks, or benchmarks

fields.name: assessment_title
fields.description: Title of the assessment or review

fields.name: assessment_date
fields.description: Date of the assessment or report

fields.name: assessor
fields.description: Person or team who conducted the assessment

fields.name: scope
fields.description: What was assessed — systems, processes, or areas in scope

fields.name: methodology
fields.description: Approach or methodology used for the assessment

fields.name: findings
fields.description: Individual findings with title, description, severity, and evidence

fields.name: recommendations
fields.description: Recommendations with priority and expected effort

fields.name: executive_summary
fields.description: High-level summary of key findings and recommendations

fields.name: risk_rating
fields.description: Overall risk rating or maturity score

fields.name: standards_referenced
fields.description: Frameworks or standards used as benchmarks
